opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My calf muscle suddenly locked up into a rock-hard knot, and the pain is so intense I thought the muscle tore in half. It's been like this for an hour and a half and I can't stand on it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened right after a long run and it won't let go — I can't walk on the leg.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 90 minutes ago, right after I finished a long 15 km run in the heat
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour and a half and it still won't let go
symptom_narrative.character: a sudden, intense cramping — the muscle balled up into a hard knot and locked
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: honestly the worst, I thought I'd torn the muscle in half
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right calf, the back of my lower leg
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it eased for a second when I stretched it but came straight back when I rested
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: pulling my foot up and stretching the calf gives a little relief for a moment
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: resting it, and trying to stand or put weight on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I was sweating buckets on the run and mostly drank plain water; no chest pain and no trouble breathing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't think it's ever been this bad before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't walk on it or put any weight on it, I'm basically stuck on the floor

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: took a couple of ibuprofen (400 mg) about half an hour ago

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: keen recreational runner, out most days; just did a long 15 km run
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; this happened at home straight after the run

objective_data_offered.value: there's a visible, hard lump/knot in my right calf and it won't relax
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-observation over chat, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: I can't bear weight on the leg and I can't flex my ankle normally
I'm really sweaty and clammy from the run and the pain
there are a few empty water bottles next to me from the run
